channel.title: Agile on The Personal Notes of a Passionate Data Scientist
channel.description: Recent content in Agile on The Personal Notes of a Passionate Data Scientist

item.title: About Me
item.description: About me I am a Lead Data Scientist at Features Analytics, a Belgian Fintech company. I build Machine Learning models and look for anomalies in large datasets. Working Experience February 2017 – Present: Features Analytics, working with R and Python for rapid prototyping, Machine Learning and Data Analysis. November 2011 – January 2017: Johannes Gutentberg Universität, working with R, Python and C++ in Bioinformatics. Also, working as a Tutor, Teaching Assistant and Lecturer.
